input.itemTitle: Segment rival Hightouch raises $80M Series C at $1.2B valuation
input.itemText: Hightouch, a composable customer data platform, announced an $80M Series C led by Sapphire Ventures, valuing the company at $1.2B. The company says revenue tripled year over year.

input.itemTitle: Salesforce completes acquisition of data-activation startup Airbyte Cloud
input.itemText: Salesforce said it completed its previously announced acquisition of the data activation startup, folding the team into Data Cloud. Terms were not disclosed.

input.itemTitle: Shopify launches built-in customer data platform for merchants
input.itemText: Shopify announced a native CDP for all Plus merchants, bundling identity resolution and audience sync at no extra cost, a direct move into territory held by standalone CDP vendors.

input.itemTitle: HubSpot changes app marketplace data-sync policy
input.itemText: HubSpot updated its marketplace policy: apps syncing contact-level data must use the new managed sync API by January, deprecating direct database writes that many CDP connectors rely on.

input.itemTitle: Gartner: the composable CDP is eating the packaged CDP
input.itemText: In its latest market guide, Gartner argues buyers increasingly assemble CDP capabilities on the warehouse rather than buying packaged suites, projecting composable deployments to pass 50% of new implementations by 2027.

input.itemTitle: 10 best CRM tools for small business in 2026
input.itemText: A roundup of popular CRM tools with pricing comparisons and star ratings, including HubSpot, Zoho, and Pipedrive.
RudderStack released Audiences, a product that builds and syncs customer segments directly on Snowflake and BigQuery, expanding beyond event collection.

input.itemTitle: Local bakery chain adopts loyalty app
input.itemText: A regional bakery chain rolled out a new loyalty app for customers, offering points on purchases.
